companies.name: OpenAI
companies.summary:
[Data Rights]: Users retain ownership of Input; OpenAI assigns ownership of Output to users.  
[AI Usage]: Users must not use Output for significant decisions or to develop competing models.  
[Liability]: OpenAI disclaims responsibility for inaccuracies in Output; users must verify accuracy independently.

companies.name: Anthropic
companies.summary: [AI Usage]: User conversations may be used to train Anthropic's AI models. [Liability]: Anthropic limits liability for AI-generated content.

companies.name: Midjourney
companies.summary: [AI Usage]: User-generated images used to improve AI models without opt-out. [Data Rights]: Personal and billing info collected.

companies.name: Google
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Broad data collection with worldwide usage license granted to Google. [AI Usage]: Content used to train AI systems.

companies.name: Microsoft
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Users retain ownership of their content but grant Microsoft a worldwide, royalty-free license to use it. [AI Usage]: Users must comply with conduct rules when using AI services. [Liability]: Microsoft is not liable for user-generated content.

companies.name: Meta
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Personal data used for personalized ads; no sale of personal data without consent. [AI Usage]: Advanced technologies for safety and functionality; AI for content moderation. [Liability]: Meta may access and share data for legal compliance and safety.

companies.name: X (Twitter)
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: User data transferred internationally with varying protections. [AI Usage]: Content licensed for AI training without explicit opt-out.

companies.name: TikTok
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Extensive data collection including device settings and activity. [AI Usage]: Data used for personalization; may be transferred internationally.

companies.name: LinkedIn
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Personal data shared with Microsoft and affiliates. [Liability]: Disputes resolved via mandatory arbitration; class action rights waived.

companies.name: Instagram
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: User data may be collected and used for service improvement. [AI Usage]: AI tools may analyze user data. [Liability]: Company limits liability for indirect damages.

companies.name: Pinterest
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Users retain rights to their content but must comply with Pinterest's policies. [AI Usage]: Pinterest uses personal data to personalize content. [Liability]: Pinterest may remove content and suspend accounts for policy violations.

companies.name: Reddit
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Users consent to data collection per Privacy Policy. [AI Usage]: Content licensed for AI training; arbitration required for disputes.

companies.name: Discord
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Extensive data collection includes monitoring active apps and games. [Liability]: Class action rights waived via arbitration clause.

companies.name: Slack
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Data ownership for platform content is ambiguous. [Liability]: Business data governed by customer agreements; arbitration required.

companies.name: Zoom
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Personal info required; extent of data usage unclear. [AI Usage]: Meeting content may be processed for AI features.

companies.name: Notion
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Extensive personal info and usage data collected. [Liability]: Data deletion requests subject to retention policy timelines.

companies.name: Dropbox
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Dropbox scans user files for OCR and personalization features. [Liability]: Limited liability for data loss or unauthorized access.

companies.name: Asana
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Customer Data controlled by Customer; Asana has no liability for data processing. [AI Usage]: No specific AI usage terms provided. [Liability]: Asana not liable for unauthorized account use or data loss.

companies.name: GitHub
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Users own content but GitHub holds broad usage rights. [AI Usage]: Public repositories may be used to train AI.

companies.name: Amazon
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: User data may be collected and used for service improvement. [AI Usage]: AI may be utilized for personalized recommendations. [Liability]: Limited liability for service interruptions or inaccuracies.

companies.name: Walmart
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Personal data collection scope unspecified in terms. [Liability]: No explicit user consent mechanisms for data collection identified.

companies.name: Shopify
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Extensive personal and business data required for merchant use. [Liability]: Broad data licensing rights granted to Shopify.

companies.name: Netflix
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Device and payment data collected for promotional eligibility. [Liability]: Disputes resolved via mandatory arbitration; legal recourse limited.

companies.name: Disney+
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Extensive viewing habits and device data collected. [Liability]: Parental controls required for accounts linked to minors.

companies.name: Spotify
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Listening data used for personalization and recommendations. [Liability]: Mandatory arbitration waives class action rights for users.

companies.name: Twitch
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Data collection practices referenced but not detailed in terms. [AI Usage]: Streamed content may be archived and reused by Twitch.

companies.name: YouTube
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Content processed per YouTube Data Processing Terms. [AI Usage]: AI training use governed by separate terms not listed here.

companies.name: Hulu
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: User data shared with third-party advertisers. [Liability]: Users cannot fully opt out of third-party data sharing.

companies.name: Max
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Scope of personal data collection unclear in terms. [Liability]: Subscription cancellation may not immediately halt all data use.

companies.name: Uber
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Extensive location and ride data collected for operations. [Liability]: Binding arbitration waives jury trial and class action rights.

companies.name: Airbnb
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: User data subject to international transfers and processing. [Liability]: Class action rights waived via mandatory arbitration agreement.

companies.name: DoorDash
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: User data may be collected and used for AI training. [Liability]: Company not liable for data misuse or service interruptions. [Critical User Constraint]: Users must consent to data usage.

companies.name: Lyft
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Extensive location, ride, and user preference data collected. [Liability]: Mandatory arbitration limits disputes to individual claims only.

companies.name: Grubhub
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Accounts may be created from transactions without explicit consent. [AI Usage]: Order history used for personalization and marketing.

companies.name: TaskRabbit
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: User data governed by Global Privacy Policy. [AI Usage]: Taskrabbit does not employ AI for task performance. [Liability]: Taskrabbit disclaims liability for task outcomes and user interactions.

companies.name: JPMorgan Chase
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: User information may be disclosed to affiliates and third parties; consent for global data transfer is required. [AI Usage]: Monitoring and tracking of user interactions is permitted. [Liability]: Users indemnify JPMorgan Chase for unauthorized access and data breaches.

companies.name: PayPal
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Transaction data used for fraud detection. [Liability]: Disputes resolved via individual arbitration; class action rights waived.

companies.name: Stripe
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Data collection scope unclear for business users. [Liability]: Merchants responsible for customer data compliance obligations.

companies.name: Venmo
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Extensive personal and financial data collected. [Liability]: Social transaction history publicly visible by default.

companies.name: Robinhood
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Limited clarity on investment data collection practices. [Liability]: Disputes resolved via mandatory arbitration; limited legal recourse.

companies.name: Coinbase
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Transaction data used for compliance and analytics. [Liability]: Arbitration waives class action and jury trial rights.

companies.name: Tesla
companies.summary: [Category]: Access Denied. [Key Data/Legal Policy]: No access to legal resources. [Critical User Constraint]: Users cannot view or utilize legal terms or data rights.

companies.name: Marriott
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: User feedback becomes Marriott's property; no confidentiality obligation. [AI Usage]: No automated monitoring or scraping without consent. [Liability]: Users are liable for site use; Marriott disclaims responsibility for user-generated content.

companies.name: Delta Airlines
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: User data may be collected and used for service improvement. [AI Usage]: AI tools may analyze user data. [Liability]: Company not liable for unauthorized access or data breaches.

companies.name: Hilton
companies.summary: [Category]: N/A. [Key Data/Legal Policy]: No relevant terms provided. [Critical User Constraint]: Unable to summarize due to lack of content.

companies.name: Apple
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: User activity monitored for compliance with usage rules. [Liability]: Unauthorized content distribution is strictly prohibited per terms.

companies.name: Samsung
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Extensive personal data including sensitive info like SSNs collected. [Liability]: High data breach risk from broad collection scope.

companies.name: Steam
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Billing and account data collected; full scope unspecified. [Liability]: Digital purchases are licenses subject to potential revocation.

companies.name: Epic Games
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Users receive a limited, non-transferable, revocable license to use Licensed Products; ownership remains with Epic Games. [AI Usage]: No specific AI usage terms provided. [Liability]: Epic limits liability and enforces mandatory arbitration.

companies.name: Roblox
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Personal data collection scope unclear; transparency concerns raised. [Liability]: User content licensed to Roblox; parental consent required for minors.

companies.name: Zillow
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Terms inaccessible; data and privacy practices unknown. [Liability]: Users cannot review governing terms for data rights.

companies.name: Redfin
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Users grant Redfin a license to use submitted content; personal data governed by Privacy Notice. [AI Usage]: No specific terms on AI usage. [Liability]: Limited liability; disputes resolved via binding arbitration, class action waiver applies.

companies.name: Coursera
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Users grant Coursera a perpetual, royalty-free worldwide content license. [Liability]: Broad content rights transferred; user ownership effectively limited.

companies.name: Duolingo
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Extensive data collected including usage patterns and personal info. [Liability]: Collection scope not clearly limited in current terms.

companies.name: Uber Eats
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Terms inaccessible; data handling practices unknown. [Liability]: Users unaware of rights due to missing service terms.

companies.name: FanDuel
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Access denied; no data policy available for review. [Liability]: Users cannot access terms governing their betting activity.

companies.name: Fitbit
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Users retain rights to their content but grant Fitbit a broad license for use. [AI Usage]: No specific AI usage terms provided. [Liability]: Fitbit not liable for account security breaches.
